title: Migrate render-adr + adr-doctor to Python/uv with Starlight frontmatter
summary: Technical specification for migrating ADR rendering and validation tooling from shell to Python with PEP 723 and YAML frontmatter support.
notes: Design specification with technical architecture, code structure, testing plan, and risk mitigations. Located in /specs/ directory. Despite 'adr-' in filename, this is a SPEC (implementation design), not an ADR (no decision/consequences structure). Status is Draft pending review.
